text:
センパイ、おつかれ。
見せてもらったよ。

接近して斬りつけてきた直後に
ジャストアタックを当てる……
結構、難しそうだな。

センパイには遠く及ばないけど
実戦と訓練を積んで
モノにしてみせるよ。

いつもありがとな、センパイ。
早く肩を並べられるよう
おれも頑張

Great work there, boss.
I didn't miss a second of it.

So what you've gotta do is time a perfect
attack right after they close in and unleash
their attack? Sounds pretty rough...

I doubt I'll ever get quite to your level, but
I'll practice and put myself out in the field
and try to get somewhere close, you just wait.

Thanks for always helping me out though,
boss. I hope I can keep up with you one
of these days.
